question: Which Stellar SCF RFPs or submission opportunities are open right now?

golden.answer: Call the live open-RFP view, list only returned open rows, cite each application/brief URL, and include meta.scfRound.asOf, phase, deadline, and verifyAt when present. Distinguish curated briefs from a confirmed open SCF round.
keyFacts: Uses the live open-RFP response and lists only returned open rows.
Includes source links and current round as-of/phase/deadline/verifyAt.
Distinguishes curated sponsor briefs from the official SCF submission round.
avoid: Pins Q2 2026 RFP names or an SCF round without checking the live status metadata.

corroboration.claim: Open opportunities must be returned live with source links and dated official-round metadata.
The archived Q2 RFP list and round remain current without verification.
